content.en:
Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Those Upper Triple Heaven forces also wanted to participate in the corpse of the realm beast when they learned about it, but it was a pity that the Dao Ancestors were sleeping, just these true ancestors, if they dared to go out of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and snatch the corpse of the realm beast with them, it would be purely looking for death.

As a last resort, those Upper Triple Heaven forces chose to give up one after another, but they were still paying attention to the big matter of the corpse of the realm beast!

Terran territory.

Ye Tian also knew about the corpse of the realm beast, but it was a pity that he knew that his strength was too weak, at most comparable to that of a Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

But this time, the First Heavenly Dao Ancestor was not strong at all in such an incident, and he couldn't help much if he went.

"Let's stay honest with the Terrans!"

Ye Tian muttered.

--------------

Dark Temple.

The true ancestors of the Liuli Sect evacuated, and the hall master of the Dark God Temple did not stop it, and he did not dare to stop it.

Because a large number of their True Ancestors in the Dark God Temple were still in the Liuli Sect, if he stopped these True Ancestors, the True Ancestors of the Dark God Temple would be in danger.

"Those True Ancestors are the new hope for the rise of our Dark Temple!"

The Dark Temple Lord muttered.

At this time, a true ancestor admonished, "Hall Master, are we really not leaving?"

"Going, where are you going?" said the Dark Temple Master with a wry smile.

"We can go anywhere we want, the chaos is so big, there is always a place to stay!" said the True Ancestor.

"It's useless!"

The Dark God Temple Lord shook his head and said, "At this time, I don't know how many Dao Ancestors who are proficient in estimation are calculating, once we leave the realm beasts, I'm afraid it will be difficult to block their calculations." They will still be found, and only by mastering the realm beasts can we hope to negotiate with them, and only then can we have a glimmer of life!"

"The corpse of the realm beast is very valuable, and many forces want it, this time not only the Void Heaven will come, but the other four transcendent forces will definitely come, and even many top forces will also come. We can let the out-of-bounds beast corpse go, all we need is a shelter. Once the other four transcendent forces protect us, even the Void Heaven Pulse will not be able to move us!"

"This is the only way to live!"

The Lord of the Dark Temple hoped.

The other Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors did not continue to persuade them, since the Dark God Temple Lord had made a decision, they could only comply, and did not dare to disobey it in the slightest.

Otherwise, before the enemy is killed, the Lord of the Dark Temple will probably destroy them himself.

Time passed day by day, the Daoshan Realm was not small, and the Beast Forbidden Land was relatively remote, so it took a little time for the major forces to rush over.

However, some of the top forces in the vicinity were the first to arrive, but they did not enter the forbidden land of evil beasts, their strength was not enough, and they were afraid that the people of the Dark Temple would die with them.

Gradually, one by one, great forces appeared outside the Forbidden Land of the Beasts, surrounding the Forbidden Lands of the Beasts.

At this time, the Dark Temple was completely ruined from all hope of escape.

Finally, the first transcendent force came.

"It's the Dao Ancestor of the Forbidden Palace!"

Dao Ancestor, who had a top power, said in a low voice.

Rumble!!!!

Hundreds of Dao Ancestors in black armor tore through the void, and their terrifying momentum completely crushed all the top forces present.

The leader is the Hall Master of the Forbidden Palace, the terrifying powerhouse who is said to have fought against the Lord of the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor with the body of the top Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor against the Lord of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor Dao Mountain, but he will not fall behind.

When the hall master of the Forbidden Hall appeared, many Dao Ancestors were shocked.

"It's unbelievable that this one is here too, is it really that valuable?"

Some Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors who didn't know much asked themselves in their hearts.

"Get in!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said in a domineering and majestic tone.

Crash!

Hundreds of Dao Ancestors from the Forbidden Hall rushed into the Beast Forbidden Land, while the Dao Ancestors of other top forces and some True Ancestors hesitated for a moment, but still followed in.

The fact that so many strong people entered the forbidden land of evil beasts naturally caused great changes, and many evil beasts rushed over one after another.

But these evil beasts dared to stop so many Dao Ancestors, they were simply killed, and they were killed in an instant, and even a demon beast comparable to a Heavenly Dao Ancestor was killed by the Forbidden Hall Master with a punch.

After a while, many powerhouses came to the corpse of the boundary beast.

"Sure enough, it's the corpse of a realm beast!"

The Lord of the Forbidden Hall showed a look of greed.

Although he didn't know much about the Boundary Beast, he also knew how valuable the corpse of the Boundary Beast was, and if he mastered the corpse of the Boundary Beast, it would be equivalent to mastering countless geniuses.

"It's a pity that it's not alive, if you control a living realm beast, the value is enough to increase tens of thousands of times!" said the Forbidden Hall Master regretfully.

"Dark Temple Master, come out!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said loudly.

Wow!

A Dao Ancestor incarnation appeared, and it was the incarnation of the Dark God Temple Lord.

"I've seen the hall master of the Forbidden Palace, I didn't expect you to come too!"

The Dark Temple Lord was surprised.

"Dark Temple Master, you can't keep this realm beast corpse, leave it to me!" commanded the Forbidden Hall Master.

The Dark God Temple Lord smiled bitterly and said, "Forbidden Hall Master, I also know that I can't keep the corpse of the Realm Beast, but if I hand it over like this, I'm afraid our Dark God Temple will no longer exist!"

"What do you want?"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said unpleasantly.

If it weren't for the fear of destroying the corpse of the realm beast and causing the collapse of the inner world, he would have attacked the Dark Temple a long time ago, where would he listen to the nonsense of the Lord of the Dark Temple.

The Lord of the Dark Temple said: "Our Dark Temple has provoked the Void Heaven Pulse, and the Void Heaven Pulse will definitely not let us go." If the Void Heaven Pulse announces that it will not kill us, then we will hand over the corpse of the Boundary Beast!"

"Okay, I can protect your Dark God Temple, and the Void Heaven Pulse will definitely not dare to attack you!" the Forbidden Hall Master assured.

When the Dark Temple Lord heard this, he sneered inwardly.

Is this a coaxing child?

What is the use of such a guarantee, once the corpse of the boundary beast is really handed over, if the Dark God Temple Lord does not protect it, they will still not be able to block the attack of the Void Heaven One Vein.

"Forbidden Hall Master, it's better to wait for the Void Heaven One Vein to come, if the Void Heaven Hall Lord of the Void Heaven One Vein personally promises and makes an oath, then I will hand over the corpse of the Boundary Beast!" said the Dark God Hall Master.

"You ......"

The Forbidden Hall Lord was furious.

When the Void Heaven Pulse comes, the Mountain, the Chaos Life Alliance, and the Starhorn Clan will definitely arrive.

When the time comes, the five transcendent forces will gather here, no matter how powerful their forbidden hall is, it will be difficult for them to swallow the corpse of the realm beast alone!

"That's it, you can't do it alone, you can only try to occupy as many benefits as possible!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall thought to himself.

Time passed, and soon another transcendent force arrived, it was the Dao Ancestors of the Chaos Life Alliance, but only the first batch came.

There are many, many Dao Ancestors in the Chaos Life Alliance, after all, it is a force united by a large number of Chaos Life races, and it is relatively scattered, so it is difficult to concentrate it.

The third transcendent force to arrive is Daoshan, and the lord of Daoshan, Daoshan Daozu, is also here!

Daoshan Dao Lord, Tianshan Dao Ancestor, Shenshan Dao Ancestor.

The three major mountain masters of the Daoshan forces have all arrived, and it can be described as a luxurious lineup.

"Daoshan Daozu, we haven't seen each other for a long time!"

The Forbidden Hall Lord greeted.

"The hall master of the Forbidden Palace, I haven't seen you for a long time, I thought you had stepped into the ranks of the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but now that you look at it, you are still the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor!"

Daoshan Daozu was a little old man, stroking his beard and looking at the hall master of the Forbidden Hall with a smile.

When the hall master of the Forbidden Hall heard this, he was immediately angry.

He also wanted to impact the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor level, but unfortunately this step was too difficult.

The entire Daoshan realm has also stepped into this level by Daoshan Dao Ancestor alone, not that he is not talented enough, but that Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor was too insidious at the beginning, and deliberately concealed some secrets when preaching, resulting in the oldest group of Dao Ancestors having more or less some defects.

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall was such a flawed Dao Ancestor at the beginning, if it wasn't for the great opportunity to make up for a lot of defects, otherwise he would still be wandering around a Heavenly Dao Ancestor now.

The flaws made up for a lot, but there were still some flaws, which made it difficult for him to attack the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Otherwise, with his talent for mastering the power of the Dark Forbidden Force, he even had a great hope of impacting the ranks of the strongest True Ancestors, and even the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm was not hopeless for him.

But because Daoshan Dao Ancestor deliberately harmed him, he has not broken through the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestor so far.

Therefore, he hated Daoshan Daozu very much, and once even entered Daoshan.

But Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor is a Five-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor after all, and he is also a top-notch Five-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, he can fight Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor with the realm power of Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he only falls into the disadvantage, which is already very against the sky.

"Damn Dao Mountain, if it weren't for the defects of becoming a Dao Ancestor, I'm afraid that my forbidden body would be able to become small! With a small forbidden body, even if I cultivate to a fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, I can still defeat Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall thought to himself.

This time, the reason why he wanted the corpse of the boundary beast was not only to occupy the strange world in the body of the boundary beast, but also to use the origin of the boundary beast to try to make up for his own shortcomings.

If he could really make up for it, then he could easily break through to the ranks of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors.
